# proton-mail-bridge-cli

> Unofficial agent-native CLI for the Proton Mail Bridge (local IMAP/SMTP gateway). Search, read,
> send, and organize Proton Mail with JSON output for AI agents. Multi-account fan-out, robust
> WSLв†’Windows connectivity. Python 3.11+, Apache-2.0. Not affiliated with Proton.

## Install
`uv tool install git+https://github.com/codename-cn/proton-mail-bridge-cli` вЂ” command `proton-mail-bridge` / `pmb`.

## Quickstart
`pmb account add` then `pmb --json message search --text "..." --with-body`.

## Rules for agents
- Always `--json`; bulk-first (one task = 1вЂ“3 calls).
- No `--account` в†’ fan-out over all accounts for search/list (results tagged with `account`).
- Discovery: `pmb --help`, `pmb describe <group> <command>`, `pmb fields message`.
- Writes are risk-tiered (рџџў/рџџЎ/рџ”ґ); preview sends with `--dry-run`; never auto-`--yes`.

## Docs
- README.md, SECURITY.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CHANGELOG.md
